title: Class Scenes
blurb: The class scene built up one feature at a time - the progression each student worked through in EECS 204, as a single loop.

cards.title: Building the renderer, feature by feature
cards.desc: The order it was implemented in class: a flat sphere from the given ray tracer, then the box intersector, diffuse shading, shadows, specular highlights, reflection, and finally an affine transform turning the sphere into an ellipsoid.
